title: AutoFish+
description: Enhance your fishing experience with automatic recasting, customizable delays, and smart rod management — all in a clean and lightweight mod.
body:
# 🟢 AutoFish+

> 🎣 Fully automated fishing with smart logic, clean UI, and zero hassle.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🎣 **Automatic fishing**  
  Detects fish bites and reels in instantly

- ⏱️ **Custom recast delay**  
  Fine-tune delay before casting again

- 🌙 **Night fishing control**  
  Option to stop fishing during night

- 🪝 **Auto rod replacement**  
  Automatically switches to a new rod if yours breaks

- 💬 **Action bar feedback**  
  Displays mod status directly in-game

- ⚙️ **In-game configuration**  
  Fully configurable via Mod Menu

- ⌨️ **Keybindings**
  - Toggle mod on/off  
  - Open config screen  

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

All settings are available directly in-game:

- Recast delay (with precise control)
- Enable/disable night fishing
- Toggle rod replacement
- Enable/disable the mod

---

## 🚀 Why AutoFish+?

- Lightweight and efficient  
- Clean and simple UI  
- No unnecessary features  
- Seamless Fabric integration  

---

## 🔧 Requirements

- Fabric Loader  
- Fabric API  
- Cloth Config API
- Mod Menu (for config screen)

---

## 📦 Supported Versions

- ✔️ Minecraft 1.21.x, 26.х.х

---

## 💡 Notes

- Client-side only  
- Vanilla-friendly  
- Does not modify fishing mechanics or loot  

---

## ❤️ Credits

Developed by **euphoria**
